creator: ports@logvinov.com
text:
Added option for installing of the official bonus packs collection.
  Changed DIST_SUBDIR for compatibility with games/linux-ut.
  Respect DESTDIR.
  Removed USE_PERL5 and lang/perl5.8 dependence.
  Restored netgames patch which broken in previous 451 port versions.
  Allowed using more game options in ucc_map for rc_subr script such as
  "DM-Morbias][?game=BotPack.TeamGamePlus?mutator=".
